spatial_unit: 2-km planning grid clipped to Buchanan County boundary
action: select one candidate planning unit for restoration or reclamation priority at each step

reward_terms.risk_reduction: risk_index and AML count/severity in selected unit
reward_terms.water_protection: water_priority based on NHD flowline distance and density
reward_terms.connectivity: bonus for selecting units adjacent to already selected units

crs_storage: EPSG:4326 for GeoJSON outputs; metric features computed in EPSG:3857
